title: Rebuild Follow-Ups page with editable message templates as primary focus

requirements.text: Redesign the FollowUpsPage component to display message templates as the primary content, replacing the current customer list view with a template-focused layout

quotes: message templates as the primary focus

acceptanceCriteria: The Follow-Ups page displays message templates prominently as the main content
The previous customer list view is removed or moved to a secondary position
The page layout is clean and organized for easy template management

requirements.text: Display all four message template types simultaneously on the Follow-Ups page: post-job satisfaction (3-7 days after completion), 6-month mold prevention check-in, seasonal check-ins (spring moisture season and fall prep), and Google review request template
acceptanceCriteria: Post-job satisfaction template is visible with description indicating 3-7 days after completion timing
6-month mold prevention check-in template is visible
Seasonal check-ins templates are visible (spring moisture season and fall prep)
Google review request template is visible
All four template types are displayed on the same page without requiring selection

requirements.text: Implement editable text areas for each message template on the Follow-Ups page that allow users to customize the template content in real-time

quotes: all templates be visible/editable at once
Editable text area for customizing the message

acceptanceCriteria: Each template has an editable text area that displays the current template content
Users can modify template text directly in the text area
Changes to template text are reflected immediately in the interface
Text areas are appropriately sized for message content

requirements.text: Add a preview section for each message template that displays the formatted message with customer name placeholders and shows how the message will appear when sent
acceptanceCriteria: Each template includes a preview section showing the formatted message
Preview displays placeholders like [Customer Name] to indicate customization points
Preview updates dynamically as template text is edited
Preview is visually distinct from the editable text area

requirements.text: Add a copy-to-clipboard button for each message template that copies the formatted message text and displays a success notification when the copy operation completes

quotes: Copy-to-clipboard button for easy manual sending

acceptanceCriteria: Each template has a clearly labeled copy-to-clipboard button
Clicking the button copies the formatted message text to the clipboard
A success notification appears after successful copy operation
The button provides visual feedback when clicked

requirements.text: Create default message template text for post-job satisfaction that requests customer feedback 3-7 days after job completion, including placeholders for customer name and customizable content

quotes: requesting feedback 3-7 days after job completion

acceptanceCriteria: Template includes friendly greeting with customer name placeholder
Message references recent mold remediation service
Requests feedback or satisfaction confirmation
Tone is professional and appreciative

requirements.text: Create default message template text for 6-month mold prevention check-in that reminds customers about preventive maintenance and offers a check-in appointment, including placeholders for customer name
acceptanceCriteria: Template emphasizes importance of preventive maintenance
Message offers to schedule a check-in appointment
Content is helpful and positions the business as proactive
Includes customer name placeholder

requirements.text: Create default message template text for seasonal check-ins covering spring moisture season and fall prep, with messaging appropriate for each season's mold prevention needs and customer name placeholders

quotes: Seasonal check-ins (spring moisture season, fall prep)
seasonal check-ins (spring moisture season, fall prep)

acceptanceCriteria: Spring template addresses moisture concerns typical of spring season
Fall template addresses preparation for winter and moisture control
Both templates offer seasonal inspection or consultation
Templates include customer name placeholders

requirements.text: Create default message template text for Google review request that politely asks customers to leave a review with a placeholder for the business Google review link and customer name
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes friendly request for Google review
Message expresses appreciation for customer's business
Includes clear placeholder for Google review link insertion
Tone is polite and not overly pushy

constraints: Do not modify the Header component navigation or routing configuration
Do not change backend data structures or API functions
Maintain the existing earth-tone color scheme and mobile-responsive design
Do not integrate with external messaging or email services
nonGoals: Automated sending of messages to customers
Integration with SMS or email services
Customer selection or filtering on the Follow-Ups page
Reminder scheduling or due date tracking functionality
Backend storage of edited template content
